title: PROSPEX — Elevated Leads | CAPXEL | CAPXEL
content: CAPXEL — AI-Native Consumer IntelligenceNot Just Leads The Exact People Who Will BuyDefine your ideal customer with precision. We'll find as many as you need from our 260M+ identity database.Build Your AudienceExplore INSPEXThe iceberg is real: most signal is hidden beneath the surface.Elevated LeadsPrecision Audiences — Not Garbage ListsPROSPEX isn’t a “names and emails” product. It’s a white-glove audience build using deep identity enrichment.You pick the exact traits. Want single mothers in the Midwest making over $100K who have dogs? Done. CAPXEL finds the matching identities, enriches them, and delivers them for activation.FeaturesExact matches. Deep profiles. Unlimited scale.Exact Trait SelectionDefine the precise characteristics you want — down to niche combinations — and we build the audience.Full EnrichmentNot a name-and-email list. Profiles include deep enrichment (500+ fields) for targeting and analysis.Unlimited ScaleNeed 5,000 or 5,000,000? PROSPEX pulls from CAPXEL’s 260M+ US identity foundation.Continuous TargetingRefresh audiences over time as your criteria evolves — with consistent matching and delivery.Use CasesPROSPEX is built for activation across performance channels.Paired With INSPEXINSPEX finds your avatar. PROSPEX finds more of them — at scale.Meta Custom AudiencesBuild highly specific audiences and onboard them for performance acquisition.Email + Direct MailUse enriched identity profiles for multi-channel lifecycle and offline activation.Geo-Targeted OffersCombine trait filters with precise geographies for localized acquisition.Data WarehousingBring enriched identities into your analytics environment to improve LTV modeling.Audience Build, Done For YouDefine the Traits. We’ll Deliver the People.CAPXEL’s team builds precise, enriched audiences so your marketing team can execute with confidence.Build Your AudienceCapture With SPYBOXFAQCommon questions about PROSPEX.What is PROSPEX?How is PROSPEX different from list vendors?How specific can the traits be?How do we receive the audience?What should I pair PROSPEX with?
